g.title: sanity
g.text: fork(P_i.kb), add h_i = C \ P_i, saturate
verify state_hash(...) is identical across all i

g.title: fork_one
g.text: fork ANY one parent P's kb

g.title: add_hyp
g.text: add hypothesis h = C \ P to fork

g.title: dead_pre
g.text: record SetNode in D_N with verdict="dead"

g.title: merge_into
g.text: • audit row in A_N or D_N

g.title: dead_post
g.text: record SetNode in D_N with verdict="dead"

g.title: alive_integrate
g.text: for EACH parent P_i of C:
• adopt forced_positives (if forced at P_i too)

g.title: dead_pre_integrate
g.text: for EACH parent P_i of C:

g.title: dead_post_integrate
g.text: for EACH parent P_i of C:
